name: Uptime.com
description: Website, API, status page and synthetic monitoring service with user-journey transaction checks.

seo.title: Uptime.com — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Uptime.com: Website, API, status page and synthetic monitoring service with user-journey transaction checks.

when_to_use: Synthetic uptime monitoring from global probe locations
Multi-step user transaction checks for web apps
Status page with subscriber notifications on incidents
API endpoint SLA monitoring with history reporting

pros: User-journey transaction checks beyond simple pings
Status pages and synthetic monitoring included
cons: UI less modern than Checkly or Better Stack
Scripting editor less powerful than Checkly
review.verdict: Solid all-in-one uptime and synthetic platform at fair prices; functional but less exciting than newer rivals.
review.best_for: Teams wanting reliable uptime, synthetic checks and status pages at predictable pricing.
review.not_for: Modern dev teams preferring code-first synthetic monitoring like Checkly.
